revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:銅山川]]
'''Dōzan River''' (銅山川) refers to several rivers across Japan. The name typically derives from the presence of {{ill|Copper extraction|en|Copper extraction|qid=Q766401|lt=copper mines|1=Copper extraction}} in the surrounding area, either currently or historically. * {{ill|Dōzan River (Yamagata)|ja|銅山川 (山形県)|ceb|Dōzan_Gawa_(suba_sa_Hapon,_Yamagata-ken)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōzan River (Yamagata)|1=Dōzan River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11650180}} - A {{ill|first-class river|ja|一級河川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/first-class river|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一級水系|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一級水系|1=Classification of rivers in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2908753}} in the {{ill|Mogami River|en|Mogami River|qid=Q596120|lt=Mogami River|1=Mogami River}} system, flowing through {{ill|Ōkura, Yamagata|en|Ōkura, Yamagata|qid=Q1347371|lt=Ōkura Village|1=Ōkura, Yamagata}}, {{ill|Mogami District, Yamagata|en|Mogami District, Yamagata|qid=Q1155862|lt=Mogami District, Yamagata|1=Mogami District, Yamagata}}, {{ill|Yamagata Prefecture|en|Yamagata Prefecture|qid=Q125863|lt=Yamagata Prefecture|1=Yamagata Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Dōzan River|en|Dōzan River|qid=Q5321269|lt=Dōzan River|1=Dōzan River}} - A first-class river in the {{ill|Yoshino River|en|Yoshino River|qid=Q979774|lt=Yoshino River|1=Yoshino River}} system, flowing through {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}} and {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Dōzan River (Kumamoto Prefecture)|ja|銅山川 (熊本県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōzan River (Kumamoto Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A first-class river in the {{ill|Kuma River (Japan)|en|Kuma River (Japan)|qid=Q1358183|lt=Kuma River|1=Kuma River (Japan)}} system, flowing through {{ill|Asagiri, Kumamoto|en|Asagiri, Kumamoto|qid=Q1184763|lt=Asagiri Town|1=Asagiri, Kumamoto}}, {{ill|Kuma District, Kumamoto|en|Kuma District, Kumamoto|qid=Q1132476|lt=Kuma District, Kumamoto|1=Kuma District, Kumamoto}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}. {{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|銅山川|version=86908368|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:銅山川]]
